response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience in full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure development, including work at Google and Meta, which aligns strongly with the role's requirements. However, his resume does not explicitly highlight experience with GenAI-specific technologies like vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems, which are critical for this role. His leadership, customer-facing experience, and cloud infrastructure knowledge (AWS, TypeScript) partially offset these gaps.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with leadership experience at top-tier companies (Google, Meta)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams across diverse domains
concerns: Limited explicit experience with GenAI core technologies (vector databases, RAG, multi-agent systems)
No clear evidence of work with unstructured data pipelines or LLM performance optimization
Resume lacks focus on GenAI-specific projects or prototypes, which are central to the role

key_factors.factor: GenAI technology expertise (vector DBs, RAG, multi-agent systems)
